# Nishant Singh — AI Engineer

> AI Engineer with 2+ years building production AI agents, RAG pipelines, voice bots, and scalable backend systems. Founding engineer at AeroChat. Author of Wisp — an open-source offline dictation tool written in Rust.

## About

Nishant Singh is an AI Engineer based in India. He joined AeroChat as a founding engineer and currently leads the tech team. He specialises in LLM integration, multi-agent orchestration, MCP (Model Context Protocol), vector databases, and real-time backend systems.

Outside of work he builds open-source tools — most notably Wisp, a fully offline Windows dictation tool powered by Rust and Whisper.cpp with no cloud dependency.

## Core Expertise

- AI Agents (multi-agent systems, agentic RAG, voice agents)
- MCP — Model Context Protocol (server and client)
- RAG pipelines (LangChain, LangGraph, PGVector, hybrid search)
- Vector databases (PGVector, Pinecone, FAISS, Weaviate, Qdrant)
- LLM integration (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, AWS Bedrock)
- Real-time backend systems (FastAPI, Flask, WebSockets)
- Systems programming (Rust, local AI inference, Whisper.cpp)
- Python, Docker, AWS, PostgreSQL, MongoDB

## Experience

### AeroChat (Sept 2023 – Present)
Full Stack AI Engineer · Remote, India
Founding engineer; leading architecture and technical direction. Built multi-agent AI platform (RAG + PGVector + MCP) from 0 to 1,000+ users. Shipped real-time voice agents with WebSocket backends.

### Samsung SDS (Mar – Jun 2023)
SDE Intern · Gurugram, India

### Nanoprecise Sci Corp (Jan – Feb 2023)
Product Development Intern · Bangalore, India
IoT monitoring pipelines, ML-based predictive maintenance.

## Projects

### Wisp — Offline AI Dictation Tool
https://github.com/Nishantsingh45/wisp
Rust · Whisper.cpp · Vulkan/CUDA · WebRTC VAD · MIT License
Native-Rust push-to-talk dictation for Windows. Fully offline. ~70% smaller disk, ~95% lower cold-start RAM vs Electron alternatives. Idle RAM ~44 MB after model eviction. Latency ~2.9s on Intel Core Ultra 5 + Vulkan.

### Namecard Bot — Business Card Scanner via WhatsApp
https://github.com/Nishantsingh45/Namecard_bot
Python · OCR · WhatsApp Business API
Real-time WhatsApp bot for digitizing business cards with structured contact extraction.

## Education

B.E. Electronics and Communication · UIET, Panjab University · CGPA 8.41 · 2019–2023
